title: Xtra Buttery Spanish Marzipan Pulpo A La Gallega
description: A buttery and shattering Spanish dish featuring marzipan, spherified and ayurvedic-sattvic-friendly, in the form of pulpo a la gallega, perfect for a lazy Sunday
instructions: In a medium bowl, mix together the marzipan, butter, and paprika until well combined.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for 30 minutes to allow the mixture to firm up.
In a small bowl, mix together the sodium alginate and water to create the spherification bath.
Using a syringe or spoon, drop small amounts of the marzipan mixture into the spherification bath, creating small spheres.
Let the spheres sit in the bath for 30 seconds to 1 minute, until they are fully spherified.
Remove the spheres from the bath with a slotted spoon and place them on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess water.
In a large skillet, heat a couple of tablespoons of oil over medium heat and add the garlic, cooking for 1-2 minutes until fragrant.
Add the spherified marzipan to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side, until lightly browned.
Season with salt, black pepper, and lemon juice, and serve hot.
